roa.otherSubmitter: Carlito M. Mandia, CSR 9689, RPR, CRP, CRR, RMR

roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/X:CR-110 AND CR-111 SIGNED AND FILED//DEF:SHALL PAY RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $500 TO THE VICTIM WILLIAM SHEPPARD/CCU/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:RESTITUTION DETERMINED/

/CAL: SENTENCE/X:THIS IS AN AMENDED MINUTE/INTC/AJW/CH5:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ42D/CTS: 42/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/WS/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/X: ANY AND ALL PREVIOUSLY FILED STAY AWAY ORDERS IN PART OF TERMS & CONDITIONS IN THIS CASE #22001277 & #21005146 REMAIN IN FULLEFFECT/POSS: INCENDIARY DEVICES/X:THE DEFENDANT HAVING ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER IN #21001546 IS ORDERED AS FOLLOWS:/X:PAY RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNTDETERMINED BY APD,/CTORD: THE DPO OR DUTY OFFICER ASSIGNED THIS DEFENDANTIS HEREBY ORDERED TO PRODUCE A VICTIM RESTITUTION REPORT & SUBMIT SAID REPORT PRIOR TO THE NEXT CALLING OF THIS CASE, THE DPO NEED NOT SUBMIT A CR-110OR CR-111/CTORD: THE REPORT IS DUE NO LATER THAN:04-20-22/X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES  MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN #22001277/CONTD:VICTIM RESTITUTION REPORT SUBMITTED BY APD DPO/DOPU:ATTORNEY HAS AUTHORITY TO ACCEPT RESTITUTION//TEXT/PB/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/TN: OSCAR MORALES LOPEZ/X: DA MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 5, A FELONY VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 459(SECOND DEGREE), IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 5/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 03-18-22/PPRFCUST/SA1:WILLIAM SHEPHARD/SAORD3/SAORD/ARBUCKLE/DISM3/CONTD: SENTENCING AND RECEIPT OF PSR/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:02-25-22 (10TH)/X:THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 04-11-22/BAIL:25,000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/X:EST 2 HRS/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/NP/X: BOTH SIDES ARE READY/CONT/DOPC/LDPX: 02-25-22(10) 04-11-22(60)/
